title: CMW's Adventure Mod
body:
## Welcome to CMW's Adventure Mod! a mod that adds in new structures, ore, and weapons to the game!![Picture of Ethereal Portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c87341a4117ac7d3a6a7962d0db1ae061b2c61fd.png)
This is the Ethereal Portal. The only way to access the new **Etheria Dimension**. They are found spread out across the world and wont be an easy task to find. Keep your eyes peeled for one! inside the chest contains a new item the **Golden Shard**, which acts as this portal's Flint and Steel. Through this portal is the brand new ore, **Etherean Crystals**, and the brand new Dimension, **Etheria!**![Etheria Forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5d08955de6bc9c78dbc3bca0eef92ad0100a605.png)
This dimension is made up of both the Ethereal Forest and Caves that generate vanilla ore. Along with this another new structure can be found in this world known as the **Ethereal Dungeon**!![Ethereal Dungeon and Ethereal Guardian](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9b873d45ec311afb5327db36ff799031e32f1c9.png)
This small structure contains a brand new boss known as the **Ethereal Guardian** that wears the all new **Guardian Armor** that can only be obtained by defeating the Ethereal Guardian.

As an addition to these brand new features, there is also a change to the overworld, the introduction of the new **Cobalt Dungeon**!![Cobalt Dungeon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4dbef41896d1dfc7578915e7d06bb4d4af140f35.png)
Similar to the Ethereal Dungeon, this structure is very rare, but only spawns at some of the lowest depths of the Overworld. Inside the Dungeon holds 4 Mob Spawners for the brand new Mob the **Cobalt Brute**!

With the introduction to Cobalt there are now Cobalt Bricks, Armor, and the new **Cobalt Hammer**.![Cobalt Display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39f34f8d17514374e30b3fd3521588715947e553.png)
This Hammer does 11 Damage but has an incredibly slow attack speed giving it a great balance!

This Mod can be used In any pack with Credit. Made possible with MCreator.
